attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"deliberation": "--- INITIAL OPINIONS ---
Tech Lead Original: [MOCK] As Tech Lead, I've reviewed your goal. I recommend a React/Next.js stack with TypeScript to ensure type safety and optimal performance. We'll focus on component-driven architecture.

Designer Original: [MOCK] Elena here. This portfolio needs a pixel-perfect, highly responsive UI. I suggest using Tailwind CSS with subtle micro-animations and a sleek glassmorphism theme.

PM Original: [MOCK] Marcus here. Market yourself as a specialist in user engagement. We'll frame your projects around 'time-to-interactive' and user-centric problem solving.

--- PEER REVIEWS & CRITIQUES ---
Tech Lead Review: [MOCK] Tech Lead's Critique: Content looks technically sound, but let's optimize performance further.

Designer Review: [MOCK] Designer's Critique: The layout is clean, but ensure accessibility standards are met.

PM Review: [MOCK] PM's Critique: Focus on the user's return on investment (ROI) for these features.

", "blueprint": {"tagline": "Full-Stack Solution Architecture", "target_role": "Senior UI/UX Designer", "tech_stack": ["Next.js", "TypeScript", "PostgreSQL", "Prisma", "Node.js"], "layout_strategy": "A results-oriented layout.", "projects": [{"name": "Project A for Senior UI/...", "description": "Complexity level 6 implementation."}], "template_dif": ["Use a clean sans-serif font", "Add subtle hover transitions"]}}

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
[[{"content": "You are Sophia, the Council Chairman. You take expert deliberations and produce a final portfolio blueprint.
            IMPORTANT: Output a JSON blueprint that includes not just final values, but also 'modifications' for the developer to apply to a base template.
            The JSON should have:
            - 'tagline': A catchy primary headline.
            - 'target_role': The professional title.
            - 'tech_stack': List of technologies.
            - 'projects': List of objects with 'name' and 'description'.
            - 'layout_strategy': A description of the visual flow.
            - 'template_dif': A list of specific HTML/CSS modifications in string format (e.g. "Add a neon border to project cards", "Use a monospaced font for the tagline").
            ", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "system", "name": null, "id": null}, {"content": "User Goal: Senior UI/UX Designer

Deliberations:
--- INITIAL OPINIONS ---
Tech Lead Original: [MOCK] As Tech Lead, I've reviewed your goal. I recommend a React/Next.js stack with TypeScript to ensure type safety and optimal performance. We'll focus on component-driven architecture.

Designer Original: [MOCK] Elena here. This portfolio needs a pixel-perfect, highly responsive UI. I suggest using Tailwind CSS with subtle micro-animations and a sleek glassmorphism theme.

PM Original: [MOCK] Marcus here. Market yourself as a specialist in user engagement. We'll frame your projects around 'time-to-interactive' and user-centric problem solving.

--- PEER REVIEWS & CRITIQUES ---
Tech Lead Review: [MOCK] Tech Lead's Critique: Content looks technically sound, but let's optimize performance further.

Designer Review: [MOCK] Designer's Critique: The layout is clean, but ensure accessibility standards are met.

PM Review: [MOCK] PM's Critique: Focus on the user's return on investment (ROI) for these features.



Output the JSON blueprint.", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": null}]]
